title: For many, Israeli attacks in Lebanon evoke its war in Gaza
Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
Ukraine Ramps Up Attacks on Russian Oil, Aiming to Curb Iran War Windfall
text: As the Persian Gulf conflict boosts the oil revenue that finances Moscow’s war against Ukraine, Kyiv’s forces are striking at Russia’s ability to refine and ship its crude.
